## What changed

Describe the focused change.

## Why

Explain the user or developer impact and the root cause for fixes.

## Validation

- [ ] PHP syntax checks pass.
- [ ] JavaScript syntax check passes.
- [ ] Relevant MemberPress forms still submit normally.
- [ ] Desktop and mobile layouts were checked.
- [ ] Changelog or documentation was updated when needed.

## Compatibility

List the WordPress, PHP, MemberPress, theme, and page-builder versions tested.
